name: Demo Food Ordering
description: A Flutter-style manifest that could be generated from widget annotations.

screens.title: Restaurant
screens.purpose: Show menu items from one restaurant.

elements.purpose: Expose one menu item, its modifiers, and add-to-cart action.

actions.title: Add menu item
actions.description: Add a selected item and modifiers to cart.

elements.label: Open in maps
elements.purpose: Pass the delivery coordinates to a navigation app.

actions.title: Open route in maps
actions.description: Future cross-app handoff: send pickup/drop coordinates to a maps app action graph.
